_comment: Host states an upgrading machine can actually be in, each a list of record
files from ./records/. The record files are the frozen bytes; a host state is
only a composition of them, so the same v2 record is byte-identical whether it
sits alone (v2-only) or beside a v3 record (mixed). Seed with ../seed-store.sh.
absent and empty carry no records and need no entry-list beyond [].
